title: carlina sicula var. mareotica
intro: Carlina sicula var. mareotica, commonly known as a variety of the Carline Thistle, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carlina sicula var. mareotica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
